items.name: Commercial Coverage Assurance Program — Rebate
items.summary: If reimbursement on an eligible commercial claim falls below the office's acquisition cost, request a rebate for the difference.
eligibility: Date of service on or after February 1, 2024
Reimbursement below acquisition cost (under-reimbursement, not full denial)
requiredDocs: Explanation of Benefits (EOB) with PHI redacted

items.name: Commercial Coverage Assurance Program — Replacement
items.summary: On a full coverage denial, request a free replacement implant.
eligibility: Date of service on or after February 1, 2024
Full coverage denial (partial reimbursement → use the rebate program instead)
items.cap: Maximum 5 replacements per HCP per insurance plan per calendar year
